=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/serviceNotAsClass_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377056: `Context.Service` is assigned to a variable here, but this API is intended for a class declaration shape such as `class Preview extends Context.Service<Preview, { port: number }>()("Preview") {}`. effect(serviceNotAsClass)


==== /.src/serviceNotAsClass_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics serviceNotAsClass:warning
    import { Context } from "effect"
    
    export const Preview = Context.Service<{ port: number }>("Preview")
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377056: `Context.Service` is assigned to a variable here, but this API is intended for a class declaration shape such as `class Preview extends Context.Service<Preview, { port: number }>()("Preview") {}`. effect(serviceNotAsClass)
